title: 25 Pieces Sewing Machine Bobbins, Empty Metal Bobbins Spool Sewing Spools with Storage Case for Brother, Toyota, Singer, Janome, Kenmore
features: Quantity: 25-pack of empty sewing machine bobbins, easy to thread and use, enough for your daily use and replacement.
Durable Material: The sewing machine bobbin is made of stainless steel, which is durable and not easy to break or deform.
Rust-proof Surface: The surface of the bobbin has an anti-rust and anti-aging coating, which will not affect normal use even if it gets wet.
Wide Application: Metal bobbins are fit for most domestic sewing machines. Such as brother, toyota, singer, janome, kenmore etc..
Convenient to Storage: Comes with a plastics 25 grid box, protect the bobbin from falling, making it easy to store and carry.
description: Product Description Specification: Color: Silver Material: Stainless Steel Size: Diameter 20 mm, Height 11.5 mm, Inner Diameter 6 mm Feature: 1. A sufficient number of bobbins can be used for a long time. 2. Each bobbin with one compartments that easy to remove and use. 3. This standard set of metal spools runs smoothly to ensure correct sewing. Package includes: 1 x Plastic Storage Box 25 x Sewing Machine Bobbins
